chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: Today we will know who has the courage  In this video of 100 days of code, you will get an exercise  And you have to do this exercise today  Solve it  And after that you will have to give me the solution

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: We will know who will do it  If you have the courage, then solve it  Let's go to the computer screen and I will tell you what is the question you have to solve  Intro  So guys, now I would like to tell you about operators

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: And why operators are important  And after that I will give you an exercise  So operators are simple things  We have studied in mathematics  If you are in class 5, then you should know what is an operator

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: If you are watching this video in 4th class, then listen to what happens  Addition is 15 plus 7  Add two numbers  You took a toffee for 15 rupees  You took a toffee for 7 rupees

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: How much did the shopkeeper get?  21 rupees  No wrong answer  22 rupees  You are not paying attention

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: Listen carefully  15 plus 7 is 22  Similarly, how much will be 15 minus 7?  9  Wrong answer

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: 8  So keep in mind  If I say 9, then you should be shocked  How did this person say 9 to 15 minus 7?  So what is 15 minus 7?

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: What are you teaching?  This is 8  But I am just trying to tell you that there are all operators in Python  You know multiplication  If I write here

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: Print 5 plus 6  You will say  What is this circus?  I will close this  5 plus 6 is 11

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: We know that  But what if I tell you  I will make it 15  So that I can do minus  You also do it

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: I will start and then divide  All these results will be printed  6, 5, 11, 15, minus 6, 9  15 multiplied by 6  You don't remember the table

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: 15 divided by 6 is 2.5  So you know this thing  You know this thing  I don't know  But a new operator

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: Which can be new for some people  That is floor division operator  If I want to subtract 2.5 from 2.5 and take only 2  Then I will use floor division operator  One more operator

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: Modulo operator  And what does modulo operator do?  Modulo operator does simple work  If I write 15 percent 6  It means

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: If I divide 15 by 6  I will give you a simple example  I will write 5 percent 3  If I divide by 3  Then 2 remainder will come

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: It is simple  If I divide 5 by 3  Then 2 remainder will come  15 divided by 6  15 divided by 6 is 2.5

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: But after dividing by 2  0.5 will be finished  And only 2 will remain  15 divided by 6 is 2.5  15 multiplied by 6 is 90

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: So these are all operators  Which are addition, subtraction, multiplication  Now exponential operator  Which I have shown wrong  It is division

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: I will correct it  And I will tell you what is exponential operator  Print 5  If I print it star star 3  If I print it

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: It is 5 to the power 3  5 multiplied by 5  I will fix it and come back  How did I write divide in exponential  Now some of you will say

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: You made a mistake  It happens to humans  Now I have written star star exponential  And I have told you all these operators  Try it out yourself

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: 5 star star 3 means  5 multiplied by 5  If I do 5 star star 4  If we multiply 5 by 4  What will come in between

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: 2 double star 4  If I do  2 multiplied by 2  4 multiplied by 2  16 will come

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: Now I will tell you  The exercise I have given you  Before that  I want to show you a simple thing  That you have to run this program

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: If you can't solve the exercise  But I will not run it  Neither will I tell you the explanation of it  This is what I have written for you  You have to see this only when you are not able to solve the exercise

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: And I know everyone will be able to solve the exercise  It is a very simple exercise  And on the next page of this  You will see the exercise  Which is create a calculator

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: You have to make a calculator  Which is capable of  Performing addition, subtraction, multiplication  And division operations on two numbers  On two numbers

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: You can do all these operations  Make two numbers a variable  I will not give much hint  I will give you a hint  Because I already know

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: That the comments will come  What is the point of giving such a simple exercise  The point is that many people  Are starting out with programming  So give them confidence

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: And awaken their curiosity  About programming  I hope you will enjoy  Now I would like to tell you one more thing  In the next video

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: Right next video  This is our video number 7  Sorry Day 7  On Day 8 we will solve this question  And I will give a shoutout to those people

chunks.text: Who will solve this  What you have to do  I will tell you now  You have to simply  Go to the cover page of this

chunks.text: In the comment section of Day 7's rappel  Your rappel should be there  And tell me in the comment section of rappel8  Because what will happen  I will open rappel directly from here

chunks.title: Exercise 1： Calculator using Python
chunks.text: And I will be able to access your rappel  And I am going to give a shoutout  To those people who solve this quickly  But don't do it wrong in a hurry  If you start out now

chunks.text: Competition is not with anyone  I just want you to do it  It is very important  It is not important to do it first  And you will understand this with time

chunks.text: Then click on the bookmark  You are watching this video in onex  Thank you so much for watching this video  And I will see you next time  Music
